title: Animated Text
description: Adds tokens to use and animate your text!
body: ## Animated Text: - It adds tokens like , for you to use and animate your texts. - It works with FTBQuests, on signs, in chat or anywhere that uses text. This helps texts you want players to read more eye-catching. Some examples: | Token | What it does | Full example | |------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------| | `rainbow[:speed]` | Cycles hue across characters. `speed` = hue cycles per second (default **0.18**). | `Cool rainbow` | | `wiggle[:amp][,speed=?]` | Vertical sine bob per char. `amp`=px amplitude (default **1.0**), `speed` (default **6.0**). You can pass just a number for `amp`. | `Bouncy` | | `gradient:color1,color2,...` | Static color gradient across the span. 2+ hex colors required. | `Sunset` | | `pulse[:speed]` | Pulses brightness of the current color. `speed` in Hz (default **1.0** if set; engine clamps to ≥0). | `Heartbeat` | | `shake[:amp]` | Horizontal jitter. `amp` in pixels (default if provided is parsed; engine clamps to ≥0). | `Shaky line` | | `color:hex` | Sets a solid base RGB color (till closed). | `Sky blue` | | `bounce[:amp][,speed=?]` | Absolute-value vertical bounce. `amp` px (default **1.0**), `speed` (default **6.0**). | `Boing` | | `wave[:amp][,speed=?]` | Horizontal sine wave per char. `amp` px (default **1.0**), `speed` (default **6.0**). | `~ wave ~` | | `glitch[:intensity]` | Random per-frame jitter + tint. `intensity` **0..1** (engine clamps). | `GL1TCH` | | `typewriter[:cps][,delay=?][,once=?]` | Reveals characters over time. `cps`=chars/sec (default **20**), `delay` seconds before start (default **0**), `once` (**0/1**, false/true). When `once=1`, it plays once per unique span then stays fully revealed. | `Incoming... Text` | | `scramble[:rate][,on=?][,off=?][,set=?]` | “Minecraft-style” obfuscation that toggles on/off in cycles, then shows real text. `rate`=random updates/sec (default **16**). `on` and `off` are seconds in each cycle (defaults **0.9**, **0.7**). `set` letter pool: **alpha**, **digits**, **ascii** (default **alpha**). | `ACCESS GRANTED` | | `randomcase[:rate]` | Randomly upper/lowercases ASCII letters over time. `rate` toggles/second (default **6**). | `make it wEiRd` | | `clear` / `reset` | Clears **all active effects** immediately at this point. (Technical note: clears stacks; place sparingly.) | `Hello world plain again` | [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
